restoreSource: Supabase production backup snapshot identifier or backup job id
restoreTarget: Isolated non-production restore target with synthetic or approved test data only
validationSummary: Restore completed, app connected to restored target, records tables/storage metadata inspected, no production traffic pointed at restored environment.

validationChecks.label: Restored database is reachable in an isolated environment
Records tables and RLS policies are present after restore
Private evidence bucket metadata is present and not public
No real user data was copied into an unapproved environment
